upasargachandrika.example_text: 'na te saKyamapahnuve' (f॰1.130.4) apahnuve=apanayAmi=parAkaromi
'tenAhiMsizam iyaM sukanyA tayA te'pahnuve' (Sa॰brA॰4.1.5.7) apahnuve nizkftiM karomItyarTaH
'yena vAhanena DAvayet tadvimucya brUyAt pAyayatEnat suhitaM kurutetyeza u vAhanasyApahnavaH' (Sa॰brA॰1.8.2.9) atrApahnavena tarpaRaM praharzaRamanunayanaM vivakzyate
'jYAtaM mayA te hfdayaM saKe mA'pahnavaM kfTAH' (kaTA॰10.92) mA'palapIrityAha AtmAnaM nirvedAya mA dA ityevaM kaTAsaritsAgarasyAnuvAdako'nuvadati
'ahaM hi mAtrA janito BavAn svayaM mamAyuDaM vfttirapahnavastava' (paYca॰1.25) apahnavaH premA
'sApahnavAH sadEvAsan pARqavAH pARqupUrvaja' (BA॰BIzma॰65.22) sApahnavAH=pracCannapApAH=apraKyAtakilbizAH
'tatra tAvadapahnute (sati) hoturapacArAdilA nAma kanyA baBUva' (vi॰pu॰4.1.9) apahnute=viparIte saNkalpe
'kAmadevavyapadeSena saKIpurato'pahnutaH' (ratnA॰2) kAmo'yamityuktvA svarUpApanayapuraHsaraM saKyAH puraH sanniDApita ityarTaH
'aNgErapahnutopyanyE ryasyA divyAnukAriBiH cakzuzA capalenokto martyaBAvo nimezataH' (kaTA0 74216).. apahnuto gopitaH saMvftaH
'ko nu mA'nuSizyAdBo itIhApeva nihnute' (CAM0 u0 4142) apanihnuta iva=apahnavamiva karoti
'te nihnuvate' (Sa0 brA0 34321) prAyaScittaM kurvantItyarTaH
'aTa nihnute… namo vaH pitaraH SUzAyeti' (go0 gf0 4317) ukto'rTaH
'ete vE yajYamavanti ye brAhmaRAH tadu teByo nihnute' (Sa0 brA0) tAnprasAdayatItyarTaH tAnkzamayatIti vA
'yajYo vE vizRustasmA evEtannihnute mA tvA'vakramizam' (Sa0 brA0 1452) tadvyatikramaM nizkarotItyarTaH
'namo dive namaH pfTivyA iti prastare nihnuvate' (E0 brA0 126) nihnavaH prastare pARyorniDAnamiti vE viduriti zaqguruSizyaH
'pratyetya prastare nihnuvate' (kA0 SrO0 828) ukto'rTaH
'yasya tvezAmagrataH siDyet sa nihnutamevAgnO hutvA…' (go0 gf0 1425) nihnutaM tUzRIm
'tasyEva vyaBicArasya nihnavaH samyagucyate' (manu0 921) nihnavaH pApApanodanaM SoDanaM prAyaScittam anupacarito DAtvarTa ihASritaH
'nihnave BAvito dadyAd Danam' (yAjYa0 211) nihnavo'palApaH
'sUkzmatvAnna sa (DarmaH) vijYAtuM Sakyate bahunihnavaH' (BA0 SAM0 26336) bahunihnavo bahutirohitArTaH bahvanuktArTa iti yAvat
'na nihnavaM mantragatasya gacCet' (BA0 u0 3729) mantrasyApahAraM na gacCet mantraM na dUzayedityarTaH aviSvAse'pahnave nikftAvapi nihnava ityamaraH
'tadvE mA tAta tapati pApaM karma mayA kftaM tadahaM nihnuve' (E0 brA0 717) nihnuve pariharAmi nizkftimasya karomi
'gArhapatyAyEva nihnute' (tE0 saM0 1583) nihnute prahvI Bavati CAdayati vA tvamevopasTeya iti (BawwaBAskara) sAyaRastu nihnute'palapatItyAha
'na devAnAmapi hnutaH sumatiM na jugukzataH' (f0 8317) apihnutaH pratyAcakzAte
